tasks.title: Store Check-in Shoot
tasks.description: Visit the store, complete the required camera shots, and submit a review. Great for beginners with fast approval.

tasks.title: App New User Trial
tasks.description: Download the app and complete the onboarding process to get paid. Simple and ideal for spare time.

tasks.title: High-Commission Store Video
tasks.description: Create and upload a 30-second video clip. High commission task and must follow the given template.

tasks.title: Coffee Shop Review
tasks.description: Make a purchase in-store, upload your receipt, and submit your experience review for same-day approval.

tasks.title: Livestream Engagement Task
tasks.description: Enter the assigned livestream, complete engagement actions, and submit screenshots for review.

tasks.title: Brand Event Co-shoot
tasks.description: Assist with offline brand event shooting and upload the media files. Stable payout and clear workflow.

claimedTasks.title: High-Commission Store Video
claimedTasks.proofText: Uploaded the store video and exterior screenshots.
claimedTasks.summary: The video verification task was approved and the reward has been added to your balance.

claimedTasks.title: Livestream Engagement Task
claimedTasks.summary: Task claimed successfully. Please submit your proof to continue.

withdrawRequests.summary: Your withdrawal request was approved and paid out.
Your withdrawal request has been submitted and is waiting for review.

earningsFeed.text: Finished 3 high-commission tasks today. Energy is high and I am going for more tonight.
My video verification task was approved and the payout arrived very quickly.
Daily check-in bonuses and task rewards were settled together today. New personal record.
